Enter keywords above or click "Find Match" in your stash!

Welcome, Artist!

1. Log Your Yarn: Head to the LOG tab to record your yarn's brand, color, and yardage.

2. View Stash: See all your available yarn in the STASH tab. Every item stays "Available" until you're ready.

3. Find Matches: Click the FIND MATCH button on any yarn card. Our "Yarnopedia" will instantly search the internet for patterns that fit that specific yarn!

4. Updates: By providing your Gmail, we'll keep you updated on new pattern trends and your stash status.
